story.text:
# 📖 ZK Tale 10: Commitment Ceremony 🌖
**act** · swordsman · knowledge · zero_knowledge

The Commitment Ceremony. Blade 51 (110011), Moon Phase 🌖, V(π,t) terms: [C, Q]. Vertex ⟨1,1,0,0,1,1⟩. Polynomial Commitment Schemes — KZG/IPA/FRI trinity. Hiding vs Binding.
> *The commitment binds your future choices yet hides your current knowledge. Choose your ceremony by what matters most: tiny proofs, transparent trust, or quantum survival.*

## Edges in

- [[ZK Tale 9: Pairing Dance 🌖]] *follows* →
- [[Zero Knowledge Spellbook v2.0]] *defines* →
